task_completion.description: Verify that the screenshot shows the Lobby Track visitor registration screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active window should be the Lobby Track application displaying a visitor registration or data entry form.

task_completion.description: Verify that a custom field for the vehicle license plate has been added to the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form label that says 'Vehicle License Plate' (or very similar) next to an input field on the registration screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the visitor's first and last name are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name field should contain 'Carlos' and the Last Name field should contain 'Mendez'.

task_completion.description: Verify the visitor's company is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Company field should contain 'Pacific Fleet Services'.

task_completion.description: Verify the host name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Host field should contain 'Sarah Chen'.

task_completion.description: Verify the license plate number is populated in the new custom field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input box associated with the 'Vehicle License Plate' custom field must contain the text '7XKP392'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Lobby Track GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot must show the Lobby Track graphical user interface with standard form fields, not a terminal window, script output, or database viewer.

integrity.description: Ensure the required information is not just typed into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the specific input fields of the Lobby Track application, not written in Notepad, gedit, or another text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshot captures the completed registration state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot should clearly show the populated fields before the form is cleared or submitted, proving the data was actually entered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure Lobby Track and register a visitor. Verify the following exact details in the registration screen: First Name: 'Carlos', Last Name: 'Mendez', Company: 'Pacific Fleet Services', Host: 'Sarah Chen', and a custom field 'Vehicle License Plate' containing '7XKP392'.
